ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "size" TEXT /* Standard size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "usa_size" TEXT /* Size in the USA */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* Size in the UK */,
  "chest_min" INTEGER /* Minimum chest measurement in cm */,
  "chest_max" INTEGER /* Maximum chest measurement in cm */,
  "waist_min" INTEGER /* Minimum waist measurement in cm */,
  "waist_max" INTEGER /* Maximum waist measurement in cm */,
  "hips_min" INTEGER /* Minimum hip measurement in cm */,
  "hips_max" INTEGER /* Maximum hip measurement in cm */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the size conversion is applicable (e.g., USA, UK, EU) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size conversion is applicable (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., Top, Bottom, Dress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size conversion entry */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the product (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., Top, Bottom, Dress) */,
  "price" REAL /* Retail price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_conversions ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size FOREIGN KEY ("size") REFERENCES size_conversions ("size")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., Warehouse A, Store B) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level that triggers a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the stock level falls below the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Preferred size of the customer based on their measurements */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the customer */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement used by the customer (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "chest_measurement" INTEGER /* Chest measurement of the customer */,
  "waist_measurement" INTEGER /* Waist measurement of the customer */,
  "hip_measurement" INTEGER /* Hip measurement of the customer */,
  "preferred_gender" TEXT /* Preferred gender of the products (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sale (e.g., Online, Store A) */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the supplier */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* Lead time in days for delivery from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_products" (
  "supplier_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier-product relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product from the supplier */,
  "lead_time" TEXT /* Lead time for delivery from the supplier */,
  "minimum_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity required for an order */,
  "maximum_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity allowed for an order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the specific order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, inventory_manager, sales_rep) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
